var selectionResult = await SelectTargetFileAsync(files);

if (selectionResult.FailureHandled)
{
    return;
}

string? selectedFile = selectionResult.SelectedFile;

if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedFile))
{
    await HandleMissingDiaFileAsync();
    return;
}
---------------

private async Task<(string? SelectedFile, bool FailureHandled)> SelectTargetFileAsync(string[] files)
{
    _logger.LogInformation("File selection started.");

    if (files == null || files.Length == 0)
    {
        _logger.LogWarning("No files available for selection.");
        return (null, false);
    }

    DateTime today = GetNewZealandNow().Date;

    List<string> validFiles = files
        .Where(file => IsValidDiaFile(file, today))
        .ToList();

    if (validFiles.Count == 0)
    {
        _logger.LogWarning("No valid DIA file found for today.");
        return (null, false);
    }

    if (validFiles.Count > 1)
    {
        string fileList = string.Join(", ", validFiles);

        var exception = new InvalidOperationException(
            $"Multiple valid DIA files found for today. Files: {fileList}");

        _logger.LogError(
            exception,
            "Multiple valid DIA files found for today. Aborting processing. Files: {Files}",
            fileList);

        await _diaExceptionNotificationService.NotifyFailureAsync(
            "Multiple",
            "MultipleValidDiaFiles",
            exception);

        return (null, true);
    }

    string selectedFile = validFiles.First();

    _logger.LogInformation(
        "Selected file for processing: {SelectedFile}",
        selectedFile);

    return (selectedFile, false);
}
